corridor: US-2 east: Superior WI to Ironwood MI

dealers.name: Wentworth Auto Sales
dealers.focusNote: Small used-only independent lot in Poplar; affordable cars and trucks with active site and Facebook presence.

dealers.name: Marthaler Honda Toyota of Ashland
dealers.focusNote: Single dual-brand Honda/Toyota rooftop (rebranded Marthaler 2021); large new plus certified pre-owned/used inventory serving Ashland to Ironwood.

dealers.name: Von Holzen Chevrolet GMC
dealers.focusNote: GM franchise (Chevrolet/Buick/GMC) with new and used inventory.

dealers.name: Ashland Ford Chrysler
dealers.focusNote: Multi-franchise (Ford + Chrysler/Dodge/Jeep/Ram) with new and certified pre-owned inventory; serves Washburn/Bayfield/Ironwood.

dealers.name: Bayfront Auto Sales
dealers.focusNote: Independent used cars, trucks and vans lot on the Ashland lakefront.

dealers.name: Porkys Northwoods Auto Traders
dealers.focusNote: Small independent used-car lot with financing in Mellen; Cars.com/Yelp listings, no confirmed standalone site.

dealers.name: Red's Auto of Ironwood
dealers.focusNote: Largest used-car dealer in the area (since 1973) with main and budget lots, plus rentals, financing and Goodyear tire service.

dealers.name: Cloverland Motors, Inc.
dealers.focusNote: Used car/truck/SUV sales and rentals; co-located/affiliated with Cloverland Motorsports (Polaris powersports). Car-sales site intermittently offline - verify current inventory.

dealers.name: Lahti Towing & Sales, Inc.
dealers.focusNote: Repair/body/towing shop on US-2 that also sells selected pre-owned vehicles; sales are secondary to service.

dealers.name: Vinci's Auto Sales Inc.
dealers.focusNote: Independent pre-owned dealer in Bessemer; reliable used cars and trucks across multiple brands with financing.

dealers.name: Sunday Lake Auto
dealers.focusNote: Independent used auto sales and repair (since 2003) on US-2 with in-house dealer financing; no standalone site, active Facebook/BBB listing.
